layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. IMAGE 2 is STYLE-ONLY: borrow palette, lighting, composition rhythm, background treatment and mood, but never copy its product, logo, trademark, text or distinctive props. The final image must feature only IMAGE 1's product. Product: 军事士兵人. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #F5F5F0, #D4AF37, #8B4513, #FFFFFF, #333333; lighting: Soft, diffused studio lighting creating a clean and bright atmosphere with minimal shadows, emphasizing product clarity and premium texture.; composition: Centered hierarchical layout with a prominent headline at the top, a horizontal product lineup in the middle ground, and a clear call-to-action banner at the bottom. Informational tags are distributed around products with connecting lines.; background: Textured off-white background resembling embossed plaster or classical architectural molding, adding a subtle sense of depth and European elegance without distracting from the foreground.; mood: Professional, elegant, clinical yet luxurious, trustworthy, and clean.; typography: Mix of elegant serif fonts for headlines (often in gold/bronze) and clean sans-serif fonts for body text and product details. High contrast between main titles and secondary information.; decorative_elements: Rounded capsule-shaped labels for product specifications, Vertical side tab for navigation instructions, Connecting lines and dots linking products to descriptions, Gold/bronze accent banners and price tags, Subtle architectural relief patterns in the background. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.
